author: y4rr
content: Decision: Added batch_shape() method to Distribution trait (default vec![]) and implemented it for Normal. Independent::sample/rsample now appends the reinterpreted batch dims to the caller's sample_shape. The existing test test_independent_sample_shape_unchanged was written against the old broken behavior (sample(&[5,2]) on Normal(loc=[2]) expected [5,2] instead of [5,2,2]) — corrected the test to call sample(&[5]) to get [5,2] per PyTorch semantics.
